pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 25 creates CSV file at this path
setup_task.sh lines 31-47 generates exactly 15 tax rate rows in CSV file
setup_task.sh line 33: Seattle postcode 98101 rate is 10.2500%
setup_task.sh line 33: Seattle postcode 98101 tax name is 'WA Sales Tax'
setup_task.sh line 36: Spokane postcode 99201 rate is 9.0000%
setup_task.sh line 36: Spokane postcode 99201 tax name is 'WA Sales Tax'

privileged_info_summary: The task imports a CSV file containing 15 Washington State tax rates into WooCommerce. The CSV file is located at /home/ga/Documents/wa_tax_rates.csv and follows WooCommerce's standard tax rate import format (Country Code, State Code, Postcode, City, Rate, Tax Name, Priority, Compound, Shipping). The tax rates include Seattle (postcode 98101) with a 10.25% rate and Spokane (postcode 99201) with a 9.00% rate, both labeled as 'WA Sales Tax'. All tax data is synthetically generated by the setup script.
